Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Sykes and Maureen McFadden appeared by zoom for and with Denise De Oliveira (administrator).

Mrs. Sykes stated that Luis Moncada Ramos Pinto is the administrator in the Estate of Matilde Moncada Ramos Pinto case number PES-24-307248, that notice was sent to him on June 19th, and that the Brazilian Consulate was originally noticed on May 13th by Attorney Jon Vaught. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission. Bond will be set at $20,000.00. Michael Kasolas will be appointed probate referee. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration will be set for July 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
